Make the Difference. || SAP - Demonstration Feedback {5940675A-B579-460E-94D1-54222C63F5DA} Point to investigate Description Proposal V2 Technical aspect Item master data Participants would have liked more detail on how the item/material master data is managed in SAP. Provide a short demo video or a single slide explaining || SAP – Financial proposal Feedback {5940675A-B579-460E-94D1-54222C63F5DA} Point to investigate Hypothesis clarification Proposal V2 (ABIVAX expectations) Financial proposal Project Management Higher risk of delaying planning with insufficient project management (one month of postpone 100K€ of project || Credentials contacts {5940675A-B579-460E-94D1-54222C63F5DA} Credential Contact Doctolib TBD H2air TBD Cerba Research TBD || Thank you !
